# Big Trouble in Little China

Plot is driven by MC desire: False

One of my favorite movies.  It is a relentless stream of consciousness that seamlessly flows all over the place from one scene to the next.

<aside>
💡

I listed this as an inspiration for [Peace in the eye of the storm](../../Features/Peace%20in%20the%20eye%20of%20the%20storm%204e21b1585595437d834a897e603fb87a.md), but this is only a partial inspiration.  I’m linking it because even when terrible and dark things are happening, it still manages to stay light and fun.

</aside>
